title: 12 Pack Small Food Containers with Lids, 250ML Reusable Snack Pots, Round Stackable Plastic Food Storage Jars, Leak-Proof Small Tubs Containers for Dishwasher&Microwave&Freezer Safe(3 Colors)
features: Package Included: You will receive 12 pieces small food containers, each container features a lid in either red, yellow, or green.The quantity is large to meet your needs.

Safe: These small food containers are made of food grade PP materials while the lids are made of PE plastic, which are sturdy, non-toxic, odorless, BPA free. Totally safe for storing or freezing food.
Size: These reusable freezer containers are approximately 3.66 x 2.36 inches / 9.3 x 6 cm, with a capacity of 250 ml each,enough for you to hold a variety of foods and a variety of items.
Practical: These small food containers come with lids that keeps food fresh for a longer period and suitable for parties, barbecues, summer festivals and picnics and all kinds of celebrations.

Widely Application: These food storage containers can be used with confidence in the refrigerator and microwave. Our product can be washed in the dishwasher without deformation and can be reused.Very suitable for storing lunch, snacks, Jelly, yogurt, fruits, salads, etc.
description: Features: 1.These small food containers are made of food grade PP materials while the lids are made of PE plastic, which are sturdy, durable. 2.Strong and durable plastic material can ensure that your container will not be damaged for a long time. 3.These boxes can be stacked together nicely, in your refrigerator or kitchen, saving you even more space. Specification: Material: PP material Colour: red,green,yellow Quantity: 12 Warm Notice: 1.Please allow slight dimension error due to manual measurement. 2.If you have any questions, please email us, we will reply to you as soon as possible. Package: 12 * food containers
